story.title: Three Brothers. One Mission.
story.subtitle: We built CAFO because we needed it ourselves. As students, we were tired of choosing between junk food energy and overpriced coffee.

community.title: COMMUNITY
community.subtitle: Join the movement
community.joinDesc: Be part of a community that values clean energy and real focus.

about.foundersText: What started as a frustration with the energy options available to us as students turned into a mission to create something better. No more sugar crashes. No more jittery coffee runs. Just clean, sustained energy in your pocket.
about.journeyText: We spent over a year perfecting our formula — balancing green tea caffeine with L-theanine, combining plant protein with fiber, and eliminating every ingredient we didn't believe in. The result is CAFO: one flavour, perfected.
about.missionText: CAFO is designed for anyone who refuses to compromise on what they put in their body. For students cramming for exams. For professionals pushing through deadlines. For anyone who needs real energy that lasts.

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.subtitle: Questions, ideas, or just want to say hi? We'd love to hear from you.
contact.name: Name

howItWorks.title: HOW IT WORKS
howItWorks.subtitle: The science behind sustained focus
howItWorks.caffeineText: Unlike synthetic caffeine in energy drinks, our 90mg comes from green tea extract. It's absorbed more gradually, providing a smooth energy curve instead of a spike-and-crash.
howItWorks.ltheanineText: L-theanine works with caffeine to promote focused alertness without anxiety. This combination has been studied extensively — it enhances attention and reduces the negative side effects of caffeine alone.
howItWorks.proteinText: 10g of plant protein and 5g of fiber slow digestion, creating a steady release of energy. No blood sugar spikes, no crashes — just hours of sustained focus.
howItWorks.lowGiText: Our formula is designed with a low glycemic index, meaning it won't spike your blood sugar. This keeps your energy stable and your mind sharp.

faq.title: FREQUENTLY ASKED
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about CAFO Energy
faq.ctaText: We're happy to help. Reach out and we'll get back to you.
faq.q1: How much caffeine is in a CAFO bar?
faq.a1: Each CAFO bar contains 90mg of natural caffeine from green tea extract — roughly the same as a cup of coffee, but with a smoother, longer-lasting energy curve thanks to L-theanine.
faq.q2: Will I get jitters or crash?
faq.a2: No. The combination of green tea caffeine and L-theanine provides calm, focused energy without the jitters or crash you get from coffee or energy drinks. The protein and fiber also slow absorption for a steady release.
faq.a3: Yes! CAFO is 100% plant-based. We use plant protein, natural caffeine from green tea, and no animal-derived ingredients.
faq.q4: When should I eat a CAFO bar?
faq.a4: Whenever you need sustained focus — before studying, during a long work session, on the go, or as a clean afternoon pick-me-up. We recommend eating it 15-30 minutes before you need the energy to kick in.
faq.q5: How does CAFO compare to energy drinks?
faq.a5: Energy drinks are loaded with sugar, artificial ingredients, and synthetic caffeine that spikes and crashes. CAFO gives you 90mg natural caffeine, 10g protein, 0g added sugar, and L-theanine for smooth focus. It's real food, not chemicals.
faq.a6: We're expanding! Currently we ship within Sweden and select European countries. Check our shop page for the latest shipping availability or contact us for specific regions.
